words.tip: Final 't' (no devoicing — already voiceless). 'Ik eet nooit vlees.' = I never eat meat.
Short 'o'. 'Ik drink soms koffie.' = I sometimes drink coffee.
Belgian Dutch favourite — 'vaak' is more common in NL Dutch. 'Ik fiets dikwijls naar het werk.'
Synonym of dikwijls — both are correct. 'vaak' is shorter and used everywhere.
Higher frequency than dikwijls — close to 'always'. 'Ik werk meestal van thuis.' = I usually work from home.
Final 'd' → 't'. 'Ik drink 's morgens altijd koffie.' = I always drink coffee in the morning.
Question opener. 'Hoe vaak eet je vlees?' = How often do you eat meat?
Soft 'g'. Use with present tense for habits. 'Ik fiets elke dag.'
'twee keer / drie keer per week' = twice / three times a week. Substitute month / dag / jaar as needed.
